business.name: Lumen
business.description: Lumen books, routes, and reminds — so plumbers, electricians, and cleaners spend the day on jobs, not on the phone.

audience: Owners of small home-service businesses (1–20 crew).

brand.voice: Plain words. Short sentences. Talk about the workday, not the software.

content.headline: Fewer phone calls. Fuller calendars.
content.valueProposition: Lumen takes the bookings, plans the routes, and texts the reminders — so your crew shows up on time and your phone stops ringing off the hook.

features.title: Online booking
features.body: Customers pick a slot themselves — 24/7, no back-and-forth.

features.title: Smart routing
features.body: Jobs are ordered to cut drive time across the whole crew.

features.title: Automatic reminders
features.body: Texts go out before every visit, so no-shows drop.

features.title: Works in the field
features.body: Your crew sees the day and updates jobs from their phones.
